name: breadcrumb
description: An accessible breadcrumb navigation trail: <nav aria-label> landmark wrapping an ordered list, real <a href> for non-current items, aria-current='page' on the current (last) item, separator aria-hidden (WAI-ARIA breadcrumb pattern). Pass maxItems to collapse the middle of a long trail to a BreadcrumbEllipsis (root + tail kept), server-pure, no JS. Server-first PARTIAL (ADR-0012, Wave 4): the trail is the server-rendered route, so there is no client state and no island. Replaces the <lv-breadcrumb> Lit island. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the breadcrumb partial to your JTE root at lievit/breadcrumb.jte, reached as @template.lievit.breadcrumb(items=...). Pass items as a List<Map<String,String>> root-to-current, each map keyed label (+ optional href); the last item is rendered as the current page (aria-current='page', not a link). Set separator to change the divider glyph (default '/'). Set maxItems > 0 to collapse a long trail's middle to an ellipsis (root + last maxItems-1 kept). The source is yours: edit freely.
